item.title: 2024 Reading List
item.description: Name Start End Notes Thinking Fast & Slow 2023-12-17 Programming Elixir 2024-01-19 Tidy First?: A Personal Exercise in Empirical Software Design 2024-01-21 2024-01-27 Notes Zero to Production in Rust 2024-01-21 The Elements of Computing Systems: Building a Modern Computer from First Principles
